name: obsidian-book-vault
description: Obsidian plugin for creating book notes from Google Books

scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && node version-bump.mjs && git add package.json manifest.json && git commit -m "v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")" && git tag v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git push && git push --tags

author: clayAndromeda
